intake_email_text: Customer requests a standard MSA with CRM sync to Salesforce. All required docs attached.
contract_text: Standard liability cap and indemnity terms are included. Termination is standard.
order_form_text: Order value $95,000, annual term 12 months, 10% early usage discount request.
implementation_notes: Implementation date is 30 days out with standard onboarding and one owner assigned.
security_questionnaire_text: No sensitive data; no regulated data fields. Data residency request not needed.
scenario_summary: Standard commercial package with no deviations and complete intake.
